comment: Ecosystems whose latest releases should have brain coverage. scripts/check_freshness.py resolves the latest version per entry and reports ecosystems where the newest major.minor has zero covering brain entries (matched against platform_versions strings like '<Ecosystem> <range>').

watchlist.comment: No reliable public API exposes the latest JetPack release, so maintainers bump source.latest by hand when NVIDIA ships a new JetPack (watch https://developer.nvidia.com/embedded/jetpack and the JetPack release notes).
